zh.Birkin, West Riding Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾柏金
zh.Laxton, Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓
zh.Newark Castle, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特
zh.Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Birkin於大約1165年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓時，他的父親Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin31歲，母親Matilda de Cauz33歲。他於1186年與Joan de Lenveise在英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1227年在英國英格蘭越可爾柏金享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Birkin于大约1165年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓时，他的父亲Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin31岁，母亲Matilda de Cauz33岁。他于1186年与Joan de Lenveise在英国諾廷加姆爾拉可頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1227年在英国英格兰越可爾柏金享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Birkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Birkin (WR Yorks). The name had presumably migrated to S England by the 16th century.

variants.name: Burkin
meanings: English: variant of Birkin, a habitational name from the parish of Birkin in Yorkshire, so named with Old English bircen ‘birch grove’, a derivative of birce ‘birch’ (see Birch ), influenced by Old Scandinavian birki. The surname Birkin had presumably migrated to southern England by the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Birkin was born about 1165, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin, was 31 and his mother, Matilda de Cauz, was 33. He married Joan de Lenveise in 1186, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1227, in Birkin, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Birkin est né environ 1165, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Cauz, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Lenveise en 1186, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1227, à Birkin, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Birkin um 1165 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin 31 und seine Mutter Matilda de Cauz 33. Er hat 1186 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England Joan de Lenveise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1227 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Birkin, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Birkin è nato il circa 1165 nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Cauz, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Lenveise nel 1186, nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1227, nel Birkin, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Birkinが約1165年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンで生まれた時，父Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkinは31歳，母Matilda de Cauzは33歳であった。1186年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンでJoan de Lenveiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1227年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバーキンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Birkin(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Cauz(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1186년 영국 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 Joan de Lenveise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 비르킨에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Birkin nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Cauz, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Lenveise em 1186, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1227, em Birkin, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Birkin родился около 1165 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Cauz, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Lenveise в 1186 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1227 г. в местности биркин, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Birkin nació aproximadamente 1165, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilda de Cauz, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan de Lenveise en 1186, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1227, en Birkin, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
